Interface LoanDao

All Known Implementing Classes:
LoanDaoImpl
public interface LoanDao
Data Access Object interface for the Loan entity.

All implementations must use PreparedStatement exclusively — never string concatenation — to prevent SQL injection.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    int
    countByBookId(int bookId)
    Counts loans for a given book.
    int
    countByReaderId(int readerId)
    Counts loans for a given reader.
    void
    delete(int id)
    Deletes the loan with the given id.
    void
    deleteByBookId(int bookId)
    Deletes all loans for the given book.
    void
    deleteByReaderId(int readerId)
    Deletes all loans for the given reader.
    List<Loan>
    findAll()
    Returns all loans ordered by id descending (newest first).
    Optional<Loan>
    findById(int id)
    Finds a single loan by its primary key.

    Inserts a new loan record.
    int
    markOverdue()
    Sets status to "overdue" for all active loans whose due_date is before today.

    Dynamic multi-field search with optional filters.
    void

    Updates an existing loan record identified by loan.getId().

  • Method Details

    • findAll

      List<Loan> findAll()
      Returns all loans ordered by id descending (newest first).
      Returns:
      an unmodifiable snapshot; never null

    • findById

      Optional<Loan> findById(int id)
      Finds a single loan by its primary key.
      Parameters:
      id - the loan ID to look up
      Returns:
      an Optional containing the loan, or empty if not found

    • search

      List<Loan> search(String text, String status, LocalDate dateFrom, LocalDate dateTo)
      Dynamic multi-field search with optional filters.
      • text — if the value is numeric, performs an exact match on loans.id; otherwise performs a case-insensitive LIKE match against books.title and readers.full_name; ignored if blank
      • status — exact match against status; ignored if blank
      • dateFrom — loan_date >= dateFrom; ignored if null
      • dateTo — loan_date <= dateTo; ignored if null
      Parameters:
      text - free-text / ID search term; may be blank
      status - exact status filter ("active", "returned", "overdue"); may be blank
      dateFrom - lower bound for loan date; may be null
      dateTo - upper bound for loan date; may be null
      Returns:
      matching loans ordered by id descending; never null

    • insert

      void insert(Loan loan)
      Inserts a new loan record. The id field is ignored; the generated key is assigned by the database.
      Parameters:
      loan - the loan to insert (bookId, readerId, and dueDate must be set)

    • update

      void update(Loan loan)
      Updates an existing loan record identified by loan.getId().
      Parameters:
      loan - the loan with updated fields; id must be valid

    • delete

      void delete(int id)
      Deletes the loan with the given id.
      Parameters:
      id - the primary key of the loan to delete
      Throws:
      RuntimeException - wrapping any unexpected SQLException

    • markOverdue

      int markOverdue()
      Sets status to "overdue" for all active loans whose due_date is before today. Called once on application startup.
      Returns:
      the number of rows updated

    • countByBookId

      int countByBookId(int bookId)
      Counts loans for a given book. Used to build cascade-delete confirmation.

    • countByReaderId

      int countByReaderId(int readerId)
      Counts loans for a given reader. Used to build cascade-delete confirmation.

    • deleteByBookId

      void deleteByBookId(int bookId)
      Deletes all loans for the given book. Must be called before deleting the book.

    • deleteByReaderId

      void deleteByReaderId(int readerId)
      Deletes all loans for the given reader. Must be called before deleting the reader.
